# Tables {#sec:tables}

```{r boundingBoxData}
prince5Polygon <- data.frame(longitude = c(-66.9, -66.9, -66.6, -66.6),
                             latitude = c(44.8, 45, 45, 44.8))
df <- data.frame(Latitude = prince5Polygon[['latitude']],
                 Longitude = prince5Polygon[['longitude']])
```

(ref:tab-boundingBox) Coordinates for the vertices defining the bounding box used to extract data for Prince 5.

```{r boundingBoxTable, results = 'asis', message = FALSE}
csasdown::csas_table(x = df,
                     format = 'latex',
                     caption = "(ref:tab-boundingBox)")
```
